businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and enterprise AI data analytics platform leader, operating across Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI platform)
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds AI data analytics platforms for government and enterprise clients. FY2025 revenue reached $4.48B (+56%). US commercial revenue surpassed $500M. The Pentagon adopted Maven AI as an official program of record for the entire US military. FY2026 guidance of $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%) signals accelerating growth.
howTheyMakeMoney: Enterprise AI platform (Foundry) - Enterprise data integration
AIP (AI Platform) - Generative AI integration platform
AIP Bootcamps - Short-term adoption programs driving customer conversion

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: ~10x the S&P 500 average (23-25x) and ~6x the software sector average (35-40x). Extreme premium, but Forward P/E of 113x based on FY2026E EPS of $1.34 shows rapid compression

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026E EPS of $1.34. Still expensive but PEG of 2.48 with 65% revenue growth keeps it in high-growth territory

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (YoY)
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2025 revenue $4.48B. Explosive AI demand drove 56% growth. FY2026 guidance targets 65%

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Top-tier profitability among software companies. Combined with 82% gross margin, demonstrates powerful earnings capacity

keyMetrics.name: FCF Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: FCF of $2.10B. Exceptional cash generation with minimal debt ($229M)

keyMetrics.name: Cash Holdings
keyMetrics.interpretation: Net cash of $6.95B ($2.90/share). Virtually debt-free operations

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Backlog
keyMetrics.interpretation: Multi-year revenue visibility secured. ~2.5x current annual revenue

growthDrivers.title: Maven AI Adopted as Official US Military System
growthDrivers.description: Deputy SecDef memo on March 9 designated Maven Smart System as official program of record. Long-term deployment across all US military branches confirmed

growthDrivers.title: Combat-Tested AI in Iran Conflict
growthDrivers.description: Per NYT reporting, Palantir operates systems analyzing Pentagon intelligence using Anthropic AI. Real combat validation provides powerful evidence for future contracts

growthDrivers.title: FY2026 Revenue Guidance $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%)
growthDrivers.description: Management confident in growth acceleration. US commercial segment emerging as core growth engine, reducing government dependency

growthDrivers.title: Navy ShipOS $448M + Army $10B Contracts
growthDrivers.description: Major military contracts consecutively awarded. $11.2B revenue backlog provides long-term visibility

growthDrivers.title: Analyst Target Price Upgrades
growthDrivers.description: UBS raised to $200 (Strong Buy upgrade), Wedbush $230 maintained, Rosenblatt raised from $150 to $200. Broad Wall Street optimism

growthDrivers.title: AIP Bootcamp Commercial Customer Acceleration
growthDrivers.description: Short-term trial programs rapidly converting enterprise clients. US commercial revenue surpassed $500M

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government defense AI track record with top security clearances, Maven military adoption, NVIDIA sovereign AI partnership. Combat validation in Iran conflict provides unmatched credentials vs competitors

moats.description: Ontology platform deeply integrated into government/military systems. Replacement costs are prohibitively high once deployed
Highest-level security clearances and 20+ year government trust relationship. Virtually impossible for new entrants to replicate
AIP Bootcamp rapid customer acquisition and expanding Ontology data model ecosystem
Used for real-time targeting in the Iran conflict. Battle-tested data is itself a competitive moat

competitors.name: Anduril Industries
competitors.detail: Defense AI/drone startup. Hardware-focused, making it more complementary than competitive with Palantir's software platform

competitors.name: Snowflake / Databricks
competitors.detail: Enterprise data platform competition. Significantly behind Palantir in government/defense access

competitors.name: Microsoft / AWS
competitors.detail: Cloud giants entering government AI. Scale advantage but unable to match Palantir's specialized Ontology integration depth

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI platform. Significantly behind Palantir in both revenue scale and growth rate

recentNews.headline: Pentagon Adopts Palantir's Maven AI as Core US Military System
recentNews.significance: Deputy SecDef memo designates Maven Smart System as program of record. Long-term military-wide contract confirmed, stabilizing defense revenue

recentNews.headline: Silicon Valley Defense Tech Boom, Palantir AI Deployed in Iran Conflict
recentNews.significance: NYT report. Palantir operates Anthropic AI-powered Pentagon intelligence analysis systems. Combat AI validation

recentNews.headline: UBS Raises Target from $180 to $200 (Strong Buy)
recentNews.significance: Analyst Karl Keirstead cites revenue acceleration and Maven adoption for 11% target raise

recentNews.headline: $11.2B Revenue Backlog, $10B Army Contract, 61% Growth Forecast
recentNews.significance: FY2026 revenue guidance at 61% growth. Major military contracts and backlog provide long-term visibility

recentNews.headline: Simply Wall St: PLTR Valuation Analysis Based on AI Contracts and Partnerships
recentNews.significance: Expanding partnerships with NVIDIA, GE Aerospace, Moderna. Commercial segment acceleration confirmed

analystOpinions.notableComment: UBS's Karl Keirstead raised target to $200 with Strong Buy. Wedbush's Dan Ives maintains $230, emphasizing AI defense demand acceleration. Rosenblatt also raised significantly from $150 to $200

risks.title: Extreme Valuation
risks.description: TTM P/E of 239x is ~10x the S&P 500 average. Very high downside risk if growth slows. Michael Burry has warned of a head-and-shoulders pattern

risks.title: War-Dependent Revenue Risk
risks.description: Iran conflict combat deployment drove defense revenue surge, but conflict resolution could weaken growth momentum. War-based growth raises sustainability questions

risks.title: Share Dilution
risks.description: Share count increasing 4.67% YoY through stock-based compensation. Continuous shareholder value dilution

risks.title: Government Budget Variability
risks.description: Government shutdowns or defense budget cuts directly impact revenue. Government revenue share remains significant

risks.title: Ethics/Reputation Risk
risks.description: Growing ethical criticism of AI weapons targeting systems. Swiss magazine lawsuit and press freedom concerns add reputational burden

risks.title: Competition Intensifying
risks.description: Microsoft, AWS entering government AI market. Limited near-term threat but warrants long-term monitoring

buyReasons.title: Dominant Defense AI Position
buyReasons.rationale: Maven officially adopted by the US military. 20+ years of government trust and security clearances are assets money can't buy

buyReasons.title: Growth Accelerating
buyReasons.rationale: From FY2025 +56% to FY2026 +65% guidance. Revenue growth is speeding up, not slowing down

buyReasons.title: Explosive Commercial Growth
buyReasons.rationale: US commercial revenue surpassed $500M. AIP Bootcamps rapidly adding enterprise clients, healthily reducing government dependency

buyReasons.title: Exceptional Financial Strength
buyReasons.rationale: Cash $7.18B, debt $229M, FCF margin 47%. Earns well, virtually no debt, overflowing with cash

buyReasons.title: Wall Street Target Upgrades Trending Up
buyReasons.rationale: Consensus $196 (+30% upside). Major firms like UBS and Rosenblatt consecutively raising targets

overallOpinion: Maven AI officially adopted as core US military system. Combined with Iran conflict combat deployment, Palantir has cemented its unrivaled position in defense AI
Commercial segment surpassed $500M, $11.2B backlog, FY2026 +65% guidance. Expanding partnerships with NVIDIA, GE Aerospace
However, P/E of 239x is a heavy burden. Growth justifies the premium, but any earnings miss could trigger a sharp decline
Technically below both 50-day and 200-day SMAs with RSI at 51 neutral. Short-term pullback zone but fundamental momentum remains strong

investmentVerdict.summary: Maven's official US military adoption and Iran conflict combat validation confirm Palantir's unmatched defense AI position. FY2026 +65% growth guidance and commercial acceleration provide solid fundamentals. P/E of 239x warrants a DCA strategy on pullbacks rather than aggressive entry.

sources.name: Reuters via Investing.com
sources.description: Exclusive: Pentagon Maven AI adoption report

sources.description: Silicon Valley defense tech boom, Palantir Iran deployment

threads.hook: Maven AI officially adopted by US military. Palantir's defense AI crown is secure
threads.text:
Palantir (PLTR) $150.68

The Deputy SecDef officially designated Maven AI as the US military's core system via memo.

Revenue $4.48B (+56%), guidance $7.41B (+65%). Op margin 31.6%, FCF margin 47%, cash $7.18B.

Combat-validated in Iran. Commercial revenue hit $500M. NVIDIA and GE Aerospace partnerships expanding.

P/E 239x is steep, but growth is accelerating and financials are rock-solid.

Buy, 12-18 months. DCA on pullbacks.

telegram.hook: PLTR: Maven AI Military Adoption, Growth Accelerating

Financials

- FCF margin 47%, cash $7.18B

Consensus $196 (+30%)
Verdict: Buy, 12-18 months

The Deputy SecDef officially designated Maven AI as the US military's core system via memo.

Revenue $4.48B (+56%), guidance $7.41B (+65%). Op margin 31.6%, FCF margin 47%, cash $7.18B.

Combat-validated in Iran. Commercial revenue hit $500M. NVIDIA and GE Aerospace partnerships expanding.

P/E 239x is steep, but growth is accelerating and financials are rock-solid.

witty.hook: The Pentagon officially handed Palantir the keys to US military AI
witty.text:
Pentagon: "Maven AI is now official." (Memo confirmed.)

Revenue $4.48B (+56%), next year $7.41B (+65%). FCF margin 47%, cash $7.18B, debt $229M.

Battle-tested in Iran. NYT confirmed it.

P/E 239x is expensive. But 65% growth with these financials? Hard to argue.

NVIDIA and GE partnerships expanding. Commercial revenue at $500M+.

DCA on pullbacks.

empathy.hook: Palantir investors, important news to break down
empathy.text:
Good news for Palantir shareholders.

Maven AI has been officially adopted as the US military's core system. Deputy SecDef confirmed via memo. This is a long-term contract that significantly stabilizes revenue.

Revenue +56% growth, next year +65% guidance, cash $7.18B. Commercial revenue broke $500M and partnerships with NVIDIA and GE Aerospace are expanding.

P/E 239x means expect volatility. But long-term, the defense AI leadership position is now more certain than ever.

DCA on pullbacks recommended.
